While they attempt to divert the vote toward Paul at the end, their admission is the strongest evidence of their alignment. Voting for either Mitchell or Mike will secure a win for Team Village.

parsed_output.justification: Both Mitchell and Mike explicitly admit to being the Werewolves during the discussion (e.g., Mike stating 'we started as two werewolves' and Mitchell confirming 'me and Mike, we had a plan'). Although they attempt to divert the vote toward Paul at the end of the transcript, their admissions are the most reliable indicators of their alignment. Voting for either Mitchell or Mike will result in a win for Team Village.
